reason: Conservative bootstrap envelope for unattended GPU inference on OMEN's RTX 5070 (the omen-worker-1 backend). 83C sits just under the card's thermal-throttle point; 250W approximates its TGP; fan_rpm is null because there is no RPM sensor (nvidia-smi reports fan as a percent, honest-null per the C2 collector). active_hours null = always-on box, no time window. These are ceilings authored from judgment, NOT observed sustained telemetry (the G2 validation run was a short generation that barely warmed the GPU) — re-derive after a real sustained inference/build run produces observed.physical peaks. suspended=false; flip to true for an emergency stop without deleting the contract.
